title: Promotion Decision
description: The authoritative decision on whether a candidate solution is promoted to Tier-1.

id.description: Unique identifier for this promotion decision.

candidate_solution_id.description: Candidate solution this decision applies to.

required_checks_passed.description: Whether all required checks passed before this decision.

evidence_refs.description: References to evidence artifacts supporting this decision.

decision_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this decision was recorded.
